name: schoen-claude-status-devtools
description: Dev-tooling only (NOT the application, NOT published). The statusline app is Python (installed via install.py / install.sh). This manifest exists solely to pin the aislop AI-slop gate so the per-edit hook and CI run a lockfile-integrity-verified LOCAL binary (node_modules/.bin/aislop) instead of `npx --yes aislop@x` against the live registry. aislop is the fork build @schoen/aislop (adds C#/roslynator + newer rules), served from the self-hosted Gitea npm registry (see .npmrc). Install with `npm ci --ignore-scripts`.
